executive_summary: Build failure detected in attempt 2. The build process failed at the GitHub Actions workflow dispatch stage with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. No Maven build logs were generated as the workflow could not be triggered successfully.

errors.description: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error occurred when attempting to dispatch the GitHub Actions workflow build.yml
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Failed to run workflow dispatch","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"500"}
errors.root_cause: GitHub API returned 500 error when trying to trigger workflow dispatch event. This could be due to: 1) GitHub API service issues, 2) Invalid workflow configuration, 3) Missing or incorrect permissions, 4) Workflow file path issues (.github/workflows/build.yml)
errors.impact: Build process cannot be initiated. No Maven compilation or testing can occur until workflow dispatch succeeds.

automated_actions: Verify .github/workflows/build.yml exists and is properly formatted
Check GitHub Actions permissions and repository settings
Validate workflow_dispatch trigger is properly configured in build.yml
Retry dispatch after brief delay (GitHub API may be temporarily unavailable)
Check repository Actions tab for any disabled workflows
manual_steps: Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General and verify Actions are enabled
Check if workflow file path is correct: .github/workflows/build.yml
Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' scope permissions
Review GitHub Status page for any ongoing incidents: https://www.githubstatus.com/
Check repository Actions tab to ensure workflow is not disabled

errors.compliance_notes: Workflow dispatch failure prevents audit trail generation. No build artifacts or test results available for compliance review.

immediate_actions: Verify GitHub Actions workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml
Check GitHub service status for any ongoing incidents
Validate repository Actions settings and permissions
preventive_measures: Implement workflow validation in CI/CD pipeline
Add health check for GitHub Actions API before dispatch
Set up monitoring alerts for workflow dispatch failures
Document workflow dispatch requirements and permissions
next_steps: Monitor subsequent build attempts for success
Generate compliance report once build succeeds
